summary: Successfully implemented YCB-style Entry/Comment threading schema for the N5 Content Library. Created migration script with 3 core tables (content_threads, thread_comments, entry_links) and comprehensive Python helper functions. All functionality tested with real data from the content library, including nested comment hierarchies and entry linking.
learnings: The existing content_library.db already had a robust items table with proper indexing, making foreign key relationships straightforward
SQLite PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON must be explicitly enabled for foreign key constraint enforcement
Nested comment retrieval requires careful JSON serialization handling for datetime objects - used default=str in json.dumps
The items table has 199 entries providing good test data coverage for real-world validation
